backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining core business types (Customer, Job, Appointment, Estimate) and CRUD operations with authorization checks, managing customers, jobs, appointments, user profiles, and estimates with auto-incrementing IDs.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features related to customer creation: frontend CustomerForm data serialization (REQ-93) and useCreateCustomer mutation cache handling (REQ-94).
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration, describing the Phoenix Shield mold removal business app's UI structure, routing, authentication, and styling.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including primary, secondary, accent, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Phoenix Shield Mold Removal Business App with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with protected routes (customers, calendar, jobs, dashboard, social media, estimates, follow-ups), authentication flow, theme provider, and profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button component using Internet Identity with loading states, error handling for duplicate authentication, and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup that appears when authenticated user has no profile, with name input form and proper loading state handling.
frontend/src/components/calendar/Appoint: Modal dialog displaying appointment details including customer name, date, time, duration, and job type with icon-based layout.

Dialog form component for scheduling appointments with fields for customer selection, date/time, job type, and duration. Handles form state, validation, and converts date/time to BigInt timestamps for submission.
frontend/src/components/calendar/Monthly: Monthly calendar view component that displays appointments on their scheduled dates with navigation controls. Shows up to 2 appointments per day with overflow indicator and supports clicking dates to add appointments or clicking appointments to view details.
frontend/src/components/customers/Custom: Card component displaying customer information including name, phone, email, address, and job history count. Clickable card with hover effects and chevron icon for navigation.

Dialog form component for creating or editing customers with fields for name, phone, email, and physical address. Handles form state, validation, and supports both add and edit modes based on whether a customer prop is provided.
frontend/src/components/followups/Messag: Card component for displaying and editing message templates with preview, copy-to-clipboard functionality, and reset-to-default option. Shows template title, description, timing badge, and provides editable textarea with live preview.
frontend/src/components/jobs/JobCard.tsx: Card component displaying job details including service type, date, customer name, issues found, and current status. Includes a status dropdown selector that triggers mutation to update job status with loading state and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/jobs/JobForm.tsx: Dialog form component for creating new jobs with fields for customer selection, service date, service type, and issues found. Handles form submission by converting date to BigInt timestamp and calling the createJob mutation.
frontend/src/components/jobs/JobHistoryT: Displays a chronological timeline of jobs for a specific customer, showing service type, date, status badge, and issues found. Shows loading skeleton or empty state when no jobs exist.
frontend/src/components/jobs/JobStatusBa: Renders a colored badge component for job status (completed, in-progress, scheduled) with appropriate styling for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Main navigation header with logo, desktop nav menu, mobile sheet menu, and login button. Includes navigation items for customers, calendar, jobs, dashboard, social media, estimates, saved estimates, and follow-ups.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Root layout wrapper component that includes the header, main content area, and footer with Caffeine.ai attribution and copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/social/ContentCa: Displays a monthly calendar grid showing scheduled social media posts with day numbers, post titles, and platform badges. Highlights the current day.
frontend/src/components/social/PostGener: Form component for generating social media posts based on topic, tone (professional/friendly/urgent), and platform selection. Uses templates to create platform-specific content with simulated generation delay.
frontend/src/components/social/PostPrevi: Editable preview component for generated social media posts with character count, copy-to-clipboard functionality, and a mock social media platform preview showing how the post would appear.
frontend/src/components/social/TemplateL: React component that displays a library of pre-written social media post templates for mold remediation business, including categories like Before/After, Prevention Tips, Testimonials, Emergency Response, and Seasonal Content.
frontend/src/data/messageTemplates.ts: Defines message templates for customer follow-ups including post-job satisfaction checks, 6-month prevention reminders, seasonal check-ins, and Google review requests with timing recommendations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the Internet Computer actor instance, handling authentication state, actor creation with identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity persistence, and authentication status states using DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Contains React Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profiles, customers, jobs, appointments, estimates, and materials with CRUD operations and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining Phoenix Shield brand colors (dark blue primary, lime green accent) for both light and dark themes using HSL color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Calendar page component that displays monthly calendar view with appointments, handles appointment creation via form modal, and shows appointment details when clicked.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDetailPage.ts: Displays detailed customer information including contact details, estimates, and job history timeline. Provides functionality to copy estimates to clipboard and generate PDF downloads.
frontend/src/pages/CustomersPage.tsx: Lists all customers with search/filter functionality and allows creating new customers via a form dialog. Clicking a customer navigates to their detail page.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Shows business metrics dashboard with monthly revenue, completed jobs count, and average job value calculated from job data. Displays a mascot character image.
frontend/src/pages/EstimatesPage.tsx: Provides an estimate calculator with square footage, materials, and labor inputs. Allows saving, loading, copying, and generating PDFs of estimates with support for URL parameter loading.
frontend/src/pages/FollowUpsPage.tsx: Displays a collection of customizable message templates for customer follow-ups with copy functionality and usage tips.
frontend/src/pages/JobsPage.tsx: Lists jobs with tabbed filtering by status (all, scheduled, in-progress, completed) and provides a button to create new jobs via a form dialog.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Landing page with hero background image, company logo, branding text, and a login button for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/SavedEstimatesPage.ts: Displays a grid of saved estimates with actions to edit, delete, copy to clipboard, and download as PDF; includes loading states and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/SocialMediaPage.tsx: Tabbed interface for social media management with AI post generator, content calendar, template library, and preview components; includes Phoenix Shield mascot branding.
frontend/src/utils/copyEstimate.ts: Formats estimate data (square footage, materials, labor) as plain text and copies it to the clipboard.
frontend/src/utils/generateEstimatePDF.t: Generates a styled HTML-based PDF document for estimates with company branding, customer info, line items, and totals; triggers browser print dialog.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions for colors (using OKLCH), typography, container settings, animations, and design tokens for the UI component system.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining Phoenix Shield as a mold remediation business management app with Internet Identity auth, AI social media tools, CRM features, and official branding (dark blue/lime green color scheme).
